symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise inside casing and severe pressure drop across pump discharge flange.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Swapped out worn impeller assembly and renewed shaft locking nut and key.
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Noticeable significant crackling and popping sounds heard from pump suction casing. Discharge pressure is drastic erratic under normal load.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer and throttled discharge valve to restore adequate NPSH margin.
parts_used: Flange Gasket 3-inch, Stainless Steel Bolt Set

symptom_description: Pump making loud cavitation crackling right after morning startup. Discharge flow dropping intermittently with high casing vibration.
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) during high production demand.
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer and throttled discharge valve to restore adequate NPSH margin.
parts_used: Suction Strainer Mesh Basket, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm. Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Chemical corrosion thinned outer shroud of bronze impeller, leading to internal recirculation.
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly, renewed front/rear wear rings, and balanced rotor assembly dynamically.
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Elevated temperatures on both motor and pump inboard bearing housings (`105`°C) with gradual humming noise.
root_cause: Soft foot condition under motor baseplate (`0.012` inch gap) causing shifting during anchor bolt torquing.
action_taken: Replaced worn elastomeric coupling insert and re-laser aligned pump/motor train to tight tolerance.

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm. Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Duplex Stainless Impeller, Wear Ring Kit

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`drastic` reduction). Casing inspection revealed distinct internal turbulence and grinding. Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from MOTOR-101.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates over extended runtime.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Found persistent fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area. Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate.
root_cause: Mechanical seal faces scored due to abrasive particles in process fluid and inadequate seal flush filtration.
action_taken: Replaced damaged seal faces and installed upgraded cyclone separator in seal flush loop.
parts_used: Mechanical Seal Repair Kit, Viton O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Gradual degradation in discharge flow (`minor` reduction). Casing inspection revealed high internal turbulence and hissing.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past 12 months eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances.
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly, renewed front/rear wear rings, and balanced rotor assembly dynamically.
parts_used: Duplex Stainless Impeller, Wear Ring Kit

symptom_description: Unit exhibiting sharp vibration across coupling guard after recent pipework modification nearby.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over time degraded precision laser alignment.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.

symptom_description: Found high fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area. Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate. Also inspected MOTOR-101 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Thermal shock and lack of lubrication caused carbon seal face blistering and O-ring degradation.
action_taken: Realigned motor and pump shaft to reduce runout, then installed new single cartridge mechanical seal.
parts_used: Cartridge Mechanical Seal Assembly, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Elevated temperatures on both motor and pump inboard bearing housings (`105`°C) with slight humming noise. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on MOTOR-101.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over time degraded precision laser alignment.
action_taken: Corrected motor soft foot using stainless shims, adjusted piping hangers to relieve pipe strain, and realigned shafts.

symptom_description: 1X and 2X RPM vibration peaks (`0.42` in/sec RMS) observed across pump and motor coupling. Noticeable gradual axial vibration.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over time degraded precision laser alignment.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.

symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`sharp` shedding of elastomeric dust). High radial vibration measured on inboard bearing pads.
root_cause: Pipe strain from improperly supported discharge piping exerting torque forces on pump suction flange.
action_taken: Performed precision laser alignment between pump and driving motor, bringing angular and parallel offset within 0.002 inches.

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise inside casing and heavy pressure drop across pump discharge flange.
root_cause: Chemical corrosion thinned outer shroud of bronze impeller, leading to internal recirculation.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller and casing wear rings.
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Unit exhibiting sharp vibration across coupling guard after recent pipework modification nearby.
root_cause: Thermal growth differential between pump and motor not compensated for during initial cold alignment.
action_taken: Corrected motor soft foot using stainless shims, adjusted piping hangers to relieve pipe strain, and realigned shafts.
